gh_f67d9cb98c7df392629587d1.title: [Remoto] Java/Quarkus Backend Developer Sênior @ Sylision
gh_f67d9cb98c7df392629587d1.description:
## Nossa empresa

A [Sylision](https://sylision.com) é uma plataforma de recrutamento de tecnologia que atua no Brasil e em Portugal. Recrutamos para empresas parceiras e usamos IA para cruzar o seu CV com todas as vagas compatíveis do nosso banco em segundos — você se candidata uma única vez.

## Descrição da vaga

Vaga de Java/Quarkus Backend Developer nível Sênior para atuar em projetos de empresas parceiras da Sylision, na área de Backend.

Faixa salarial: R$ 12.000 a 22.000/mês, conforme experiência.

## Local

100% remoto, para profissionais em Portugal ou no Brasil.

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência sólida com Java/Quarkus compatível com o nível Sênior
- Boas práticas de engenharia: versionamento, testes e code review

**Desejáveis:**
- Comunicação clara para trabalho remoto/distribuído
- Inglês para leitura de documentação

## Benefícios

- Faixa salarial transparente (R$ 12.000–22.000/mês)
- Benefícios variam conforme a empresa contratante (detalhados na conversa com o headhunter)

## Contratação

CLT ou PJ, conforme sua preferência e acordo com a empresa contratante.

## Como se candidatar

Candidate-se pela página da vaga: https://www.sylision.com/vagas/desenvolvedor-java-quarkus-senior-remoto

Basta enviar o CV uma vez — a IA da Sylision considera seu perfil para esta e para todas as vagas compatíveis, inclusive as que abrirem depois.

gh_f6954729fde3e12c4d973d08.title: Teamflow: Software Engineer
gh_f6954729fde3e12c4d973d08.description: **Tags:** #react #angular #vue #javascript #dev #engineer #digital-nomad **Published on:** October 28, 2021 **Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106888-remote-software-engineer-teamflow ![](https://remoteOK.io/assets/img/jobs/3e2955a725ec0d5607911d243d4ff1ba1635436347.png) ## Who we are Teamflow is a virtual office helping remote workers feel like a team again. It shows your video in a bubble on a virtual office floor plan — you can move that bubble around, like in a video game, and only hear people around you. So your team can hang out in this space, and when you want to chat with someone, you can just walk over to them and say hi, just like you would in real life — no more Zoom-scheduling nightmare. We came out of stealth in January via [a blog post](https://www.teamflowhq.com/blog/announcing-teamflow-feel-like-a-team-again-with-your-own-virtual-office) and a [TechCrunch exclusive](https://techcrunch.com/2021/01/06/teamflow-lands-3-9-million-for-a-productive-virtual-hq-platform/), raised $50M from top VCs (including Menlo, Battery, Elad Gil, SV Angel, Lachy Groom, and Coatue), and started onboarding teams to a product we built in 3 months with a team of 6. We all get along very well, morale runs high, and we're building extremely fast. ## Our culture [Teamflow's Culture](https://www.notion.so/Teamflow-s-Culture-8f24be7f619a4e4aa7e93ba02d58cf4c) ## Job Description - Mission - Ensure that people can hear and see each other on Teamflow at all times. - Responsibilities - Design, build and maintain our WebRTC systems. - Own A / V reliability end-to-end — define metrics to watch, monitor them, and develop plan to improve them. - Must-haves - 3+ years of experience as a software engineer. - 1+ year of experience with a frontend framework like React, Angular or Vue. - 1+ year of experience with WebRTC. - Nice-to-haves — experience with any of: - Node.js - GCP / AWS - Typescript - MongoDB - Competencies - Great communication skills - Hustle - Speed **Apply by emailing [email protected] with your résumé.** Be sure to mention the words **SYSTEM NEPHEW HOPE** when applying to show you read the job post completely. This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human. #Salary and compensation No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to . $80,000 — $160,000/year ### Location 🌏 Worldwide
